programme.title: Australian Grand Prix Day 2
programme.desc: Follow all the action from Day 2 as the Australian GP continues.

programme.title: Australian Grand Prix
programme.desc: Albert Park hosts the debut of the most significant technical overhaul in F1 history as the paddock expands to 11 teams with the arrival of Audi and Cadillac.

programme.title: Australian Grand Prix
programme.desc: Anticipation builds ahead of the first lights out of the season when the second practice session gets underway.

programme.title: Warriors vs Sydney Roosters
programme.desc: Daly Cherry-Evans heads across the ditch in front of another sell-out crowd in Auckland for his Roosters debut.

programme.title: Gold Coast Suns vs Geelong Cats
programme.desc: The Cats quest for redemption kicks off against the new-look Suns.

programme.title: Australian Grand Prix Day 3
programme.desc: Follow all the action from Day 3 as the Australian GP continues.

programme.title: Australian Grand Prix
programme.desc: As the third and final practice session gets underway, it’s the last chance for the drivers to get their handle on the Albert Park Circuit ahead of qualifying.

programme.title: Greater Western Sydney Giants vs Hawthorn Hawks
programme.desc: The Giants host the Hawks in a massive Opening Round clash at Engie Stadium.

programme.title: Australian Grand Prix
programme.desc: Pole position is up for grabs as opening qualifying session of the 2026 Formula 1 season gets underway.

programme.title: Cronulla vs Gold Coast Titans
programme.desc: The Titans begin a new era under Josh Hannay. The Sharks have won three straight at home in this rivalry.
